## 🚀 Contribution Details | 贡献详情

### Description | 变更描述
Please explain the goal of this PR and summarize the changes made.
请说明此 PR 的目的以及对代码/文档所做变更的简要总结。

---

### Type of Change | 变更类型
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue) | Bug 修复
- [ ] 🚀 New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality) | 新增功能
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (text changes only) | 文档更新
- [ ] 🛠️ Refactoring (under the hood structural enhancements) | 重构优化

---

### Verification Checklist | 验证核对清单
- [ ] I have verified this locally by running the code or checking markdown links. | 我已在本地通过运行代码或检查 markdown 链接进行了验证。
- [ ] Parallel translations (English and Chinese guide parity) are maintained. | 保证了双语（英文与中文指南）内容的对等同步。
- [ ] Commits follow clean engineering practices. | 提交记录符合良好的工程规范。
